Object.Name: HostMonitoring
Object.Description1:
This object provides host-level monitoring information for the GEISA platform, including CPU, memory, storage, process, scheduler, and network interface observability.
Resource identifiers are grouped logically with intentional gaps to keep related host monitoring resources together and to allow for future compatible expansion within those groups.

Item.Name: Host Uptime
Item.Description: Duration since the last boot, in integer seconds.

Item.Name: CPU Architecture
Item.Description: CPU architecture reported by the host, such as arm64, x86_64, or another platform architecture label.

Item.Name: Processor Model
Item.Description: Processor model or CPU model string reported by the host.

Item.Name: CPU Current Frequency
Item.Description: Current CPU frequency reported by the host for the monitored CPU or aggregate CPU reporting scope.

Item.Name: CPU Minimum Frequency
Item.Description: Minimum CPU frequency reported by the host for the monitored CPU or aggregate CPU reporting scope.

Item.Name: CPU Maximum Frequency
Item.Description: Maximum CPU frequency reported by the host for the monitored CPU or aggregate CPU reporting scope.

Item.Name: CPU Count
Item.Description: Number of CPU cores or logical processors available to the host or device.

Item.Name: CPU Load
Item.Description: One-minute CPU load average multiplied by 100. This is a scheduler-pressure metric, not CPU utilization percent, and it should not be confused with CPU Usage.

Item.Name: CPU Usage
Item.Description: Short-interval CPU utilization sample in deci-percent. This is a sampled utilization value, not the same concept as CPU Load. Divide by 10 to obtain percent usage.

Item.Name: Memory Total
Item.Description: Total physical memory in bytes.

Item.Name: Memory Available
Item.Description: Available memory in bytes that can be used without swapping.

Item.Name: Processes Running
Item.Description: Number of currently observed running processes or process entries on the host. This is a host process-count indicator, not a CPU run-queue or runnable-task metric.

Item.Name: Threads Running
Item.Description: Number of currently observed running threads.

Item.Name: Context Switches
Item.Description: Number of context switches per second.

Item.Name: Interrupts
Item.Description: Number of interrupts per second.

Item.Name: Total Storage Capacity
Item.Description: Total storage capacity visible to or managed by the host or monitoring scope, in bytes.

Item.Name: Total Storage Used
Item.Description: Total amount of storage currently used on the host.

Item.Name: App Storage Capacity
Item.Description: Total storage capacity allocated or available for hosted applications on this platform. This represents the total application storage allocation or partition capacity, not the portion currently used.

Item.Name: App Storage Used
Item.Description: Amount of the application storage capacity currently used by hosted applications.

Item.Name: Storage Devices
Item.Description: Storage device identifiers or labels for the host or device. Each Resource Instance identifies one included storage device.

Item.Name: Storage Partitions
Item.Description: Storage partition identifiers, paths, mount points, or labels. The same Resource Instance index refers to the same storage partition as Storage Partition Available Space.

Item.Name: Storage Partition Available Space
Item.Description: Available space for the corresponding storage partition or partitions, in bytes. The same Resource Instance index refers to the same partition identified by Storage Partitions.

Item.Name: Network Devices
Item.Description: Network device or interface identifiers or labels for the host or device. Each Resource Instance identifies one included network interface or device.

Item.Name: Network Device Type
Item.Description: Type of each included network interface or device, such as ethernet, wifi, virtual, loopback, or unknown.

Item.Name: Network Device Capacity
Item.Description: Link or interface capacity for each included network interface or device, expressed in bits per second. The same Resource Instance index refers to the same network interface or device identified by the Network Devices resource.

Item.Name: Network Device Traffic Bytes
Item.Description: Cumulative received plus transmitted byte counter, in bytes, for the included network interface. The same Resource Instance index refers to the same network interface or device identified by the Network Devices resource. This is observed traffic volume, not link utilization percentage or rate.
